In the Margins

What's living in the margins of my days, right now.

Last updated May 2026

📖 Reading

Hooked, by Asako Yuzuki

🍵 Steeping

Creme Brulee Green Tea

🎮 Playing

Ring Fit Adventure (yes really, game-i-fied fitness...it's actually pretty fun!)

🌿 Thinking about

'What is an emotion? There is little convergence on an answer and therefore little agreement on where emotion stops and its causes and consequences begin...There are no formal criteria for what is and what is not an emotion. I am often left puzzled by just what a writer means when the word emotion appears in a statement or printed in a box in a flow chart.' (Russell, 2003) The struggle to define emotion and affect is like the discovery of the elephant by the blind men in that old fable.

✝️ Meditating

Philippians 4:10-13 – contentment in every situation
